task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is open displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/rotor_spec.txt'.

task_completion.description: Add a Propeller component for the main rotor and rename it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenVSP Geometry Browser window, a component named 'MainRotor' (of type Propeller) is listed.

task_completion.description: Configure the MainRotor dimensions, location, and orientation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenVSP 3D workspace, a large 4-blade rotor is visible above the fuselage, oriented horizontally (thrust pointing up). Alternatively, the OpenVSP parameter windows (Design/XForm) show 4 blades, 12.0m diameter, X=3.0, Z=2.0, and Y_Rot=90.

task_completion.description: Add a Propeller component for the tail rotor and rename it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenVSP Geometry Browser window, a component named 'TailRotor' (of type Propeller) is listed.

task_completion.description: Configure the TailRotor dimensions, location, and orientation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenVSP 3D workspace, a smaller 2-blade rotor is visible at the tail, oriented vertically (thrust pointing sideways). Alternatively, the OpenVSP parameter windows show 2 blades, 2.2m diameter, X=10.5, Y=0.4, Z=1.0, and Z_Rot=90.

task_completion.description: Save the completed model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box shows the file being saved as 'helicopter_configured.vsp3' in the '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/' directory, or the OpenVSP main window title bar updates to display this filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenVSP application open with the agent actively interacting with menus, the Geometry Browser, and parameter windows.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by editing the .vsp3 XML file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor or terminal is shown editing a .vsp3 file directly to insert the rotor components.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the OpenVSP application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP save dialog is visible at some point, or the user clicks File -> Save As in the OpenVSP menu.
